knownPublicationDrift.description: A Beijing government service page labels the list as 27 and omits 红升丹, while the 2021 NMPA change guide states 28 and a 2026 Shenzhen government standard reproduces all 28 names. The normalized blocklist keeps the complete 28-name list and records the disagreement.

skillDoseTable.countNote: The 100th row combines 砒石 and 砒霜, producing 101 named substances.
skillDoseTable.currentPharmacopoeia: Pharmacopoeia of the People's Republic of China, 2025 edition

SRC-LAW-TOXIC-1988.title: 医疗用毒性药品管理办法
SRC-LAW-TOXIC-1988.publisher: State Council of the People's Republic of China

SRC-NMPA-CHANGE-GUIDE-2021.title: 已上市中药药学变更研究技术指导原则

SRC-SZ-TOXIC-APPENDIX-2026.title: Official local standard appendix E: toxic Chinese medicines

SRC-NMPA-PHARMACOPOEIA-2025.title: Announcement on issuing the 2025 edition of the Pharmacopoeia of the People's Republic of China
SRC-NMPA-PHARMACOPOEIA-2025.publisher: National Medical Products Administration and National Health Commission

boundaries: Integrity checks prove the imported files did not drift; they do not prove medical correctness.
The 28-name legal list is a regulatory blocklist, not a complete list of all toxic or clinically risky herbs.
No dose from the Skill is eligible for runtime use until medicine-by-medicine validation against the 2025 Pharmacopoeia is complete.
Classical text doses never override current regulatory and clinical safety sources.
